notes: Stage 3 Linux boot directed debug probes. These rows are functional RTL diagnostics, not performance signoff rows.

benchmarks.name: rvc_addi16sp_712d_smoke
benchmarks.notes: Directed check for Linux entry instruction 0x712d, C.ADDI16SP, which must expand to addi sp, sp, -288.

benchmarks.name: probe_linux_beq_after_call
benchmarks.notes: Mirrors the Linux OF lookup shape where a call result in a0 is compared against s3 by a following BEQ.
